Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 58 

ELGBL_AFTR_EOY_IND 

LABEL: Eligible After End of Year — Indicator 

DESCRIPTION: Indicates if the beneficiary's T-MSIS eligibility end date was recoded to the last day of the calendar 
year because the original eligibility end date was either NULL or after the last day of the calendar year, 
either of which indicates the beneficiary was eligible beyond the
